title: Immersive Wood
description: Expands early game wood utilization by introducing Chopping Blocks, Unlit Campfires and Flint Tools.
body:
Overhauls early-game progression by removing 'magic' crafting. Requires players to manually process logs on Chopping Blocks, physically ignite unlit campfires with a Fire Starter, and utilize primitive Flint tools before Stone. This mod was primarily created for my upcoming modpack to make early-game progression feel more grounded and involved. Additional features will be added as development on the pack continues. If you plan to use this mod in your own modpack, I highly recommend using KubeJS to customize the recipes. ## ✨ Features - Manual Wood Processing: Crafting table recipes for planks are disabled. You must place logs on a Chopping Block and hew them with an axe.
![Chopping Wood](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d9e97daeb39b5ed394107d7005bbaabfc7a4c652.gif)
- Unlit Campfires: Campfires are placed unlit by default. You cannot just plop down instant safety!
![Placing an unlit campfire](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2695129087b17fdbeb584fdc8e6fb629b755e7d.gif)
- Primitive Fire Starter: A new early-game tool crafted from sticks. Hold right-click to rub them together and ignite your fires.
![How to start a fire](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64d6fadac4f7bbb1cadd45567a985b436cb3bf22.gif)
- Flint Toolset: A complete set of Flint tools (Pickaxe, Axe, Shovel, Hoe, Sword). - Universal Compatibility: Automatically detects and supports logs from other mods (Biomes O' Plenty, Twilight Forest, etc.) without needing add-ons. ## 📖 Quick Guide Scavenge three flints from gravel to make an axe head, snap a sapling into a stick, and assemble your first flint axe to finally start chopping logs on a Chopping Block.
![Quick Starting Guide](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e3ae7ab5fb8dda28534b7113ae9160f3f4a299c.jpeg)
## 📦 Modpacks & Permissions You are free to use Immersive Wood in any modpack! The only condition is that the mod files must be downloaded via CurseForge or Modrinth.
